Container.Name: atrium
Container.Overview: Atrium is a self-hosted client portal for agencies and freelancers. Share project progress, files, and updates with your clients through a beautiful branded portal.[br][br][b]Features:[/b][br]- Project management with status tracking[br]- File sharing with S3/MinIO/R2 or local storage[br]- Branded client portal[br]- Email notifications via Resend[br]- Multi-user with role-based access[br][br][b]Database:[/b] Includes a built-in PostgreSQL database by default. To use an existing external database, set "Use Built-in DB" to false and provide your DATABASE_URL.
Container.Description: Atrium is a self-hosted client portal for agencies and freelancers. Includes a built-in database — no separate container needed.

Config.Name: Auth Secret
Config.Description: Random string (min 32 chars) for signing auth tokens. Generate at: https://generate-secret.vercel.app/32

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Atrium web interface

Config.Name: Use Built-in DB
Config.Description: Use the built-in PostgreSQL. Set to false and provide DATABASE_URL to use an external database.

Config.Name: Database Storage
Config.Description: Path to store built-in PostgreSQL data (only used when built-in DB is enabled)

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: External PostgreSQL connection string. Only needed if built-in DB is disabled. Example: postgresql://user:pass@host:5432/atrium

Config.Name: Storage Provider
Config.Description: Storage backend: local, s3, minio, or r2

Config.Name: S3 Endpoint
Config.Description: S3-compatible endpoint URL (for MinIO, R2, etc.)

Config.Name: Resend API Key
Config.Description: Resend API key for sending emails (optional)

Config.Name: Max File Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum file upload size in megabytes

Config.Name: Skip DB Push
Config.Description: Skip automatic database schema sync on startup (for pooled connections)
